name: clarity-autoresearch
description: Autonomous UX agent: reads Microsoft Clarity, diagnoses friction, hill-climbs fixes against a local proxy scorer, opens PRs, then verifies against real Clarity data.

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings test/scrub.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings test/retrieve.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings test/memory.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings test/cohort.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings test/ratelimit.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings test/provider.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:loop
